name: HWR_WLNS_QSTN_B
description: This table stores the wellness questions.

columns.Name: QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table.

columns.Name: FUS_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the fusion profile ID of the employee who asks the question.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the id of communication source.

columns.Name: CONVERSATION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the id of the conversation.

columns.Name: RESPONSES
columns.Comments: The number of responses to the question.

columns.Name: EXPERTS
columns.Comments: The number of experts found for the question.

columns.Name: IS_VALID
columns.Comments: Whether the question contains a valid topic.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
